purpose: Ensure Browserbase session-create/API timeouts and worker exceptions are recorded as row-level Goldie-backfilled grounding failures instead of aborting a batch.

commands.command: ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY' ... simulated Browserbase session-create timeout and future fallback ... PY
commands.observed: ok: session-create timeout and future fallback are row-level failures

kpi_impact.goldie_backfilled_lane: enables safe retry/scale of Browserbase grounding after transient API/session-create timeouts

next_action: Retry Elsevier affiliation failed/unprocessed Browserbase rows with low concurrency after this hardening commit.
